series_metadata.series_title: DBE (Disadvantaged Business Enterprise) Certification Files for DBE Firms
series_metadata.series_description: These files contain general correspondence, application materials, payroll, tax returns, hearing transcripts, court documents and investigative information and reports.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: electronic image permanently once converted from paper and uploaded into electronic storage system. ; Paper: paper converting electronic image and uploading into electronic storage system
